description_long: This is a modern, luxury bungalow complex surrounded by a tall, dense green hedge, providing privacy and a sense of enclosure. The property features multiple flat-roofed, rectangular structures arranged around a central swimming pool, with palm trees and manicured landscaping throughout the grounds. There is a detached garage or carport, a tennis court, and several outdoor seating and lounging areas, including a shaded patio. The main building has large windows and a rooftop terrace, while the secondary structures are connected by paved walkways. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a strong indoor-outdoor connection. The materials appear to be primarily concrete, glass, and metal, with lush greenery integrated into the layout.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow complex with a central pool, tennis court, and lush landscaping, enclosed by a tall green hedge. The design features multiple rectangular structures, large windows, and open outdoor living spaces.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the bungalow from above and slightly to the side, highlighting the central pool, detached garage, tennis court, and the full enclosure of the green hedge.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the front facade with the main entrance, garage, and a clear view of the pool and palm trees, emphasizing the symmetry and openness of the design.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the rear of the property, focusing on the tennis court, the back of the main building, and the open backyard area.
description_view_3: View 3 offers a perspective from the side, showing the tennis court, the side of the main building, and the relationship between the structures and the surrounding hedge.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and glass doors
